title: Infosys and LTA launch AI-driven tennis fan experiences
detailed_summary: Infosys announced AI-powered fan experiences with the Lawn Tennis Association for the LTA grass court season, including a Match Centre, AI commentary, personalization, fan polls, match statistics, and on-site Fan Zone experiences at the HSBC Championships. The release highlights Infosys Topaz and responsible AI governance, but provides no financial terms, contract value, revenue impact, or material operating metrics.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and the Lawn Tennis Association unveiled AI-powered fan experiences across the LTA grass court season.
The experiences leverage Infosys Topaz, powered by generative and agentic AI, to deliver real-time insights, storytelling, personalization, and responsible AI governance.
At the HSBC Championships at The Queen's Club, scheduled from June 6 - 21, 2026, Infosys will operate a Fan Zone featuring Rally and VR Tennis.

products_or_platforms.name: Infosys Match Center
products_or_platforms.description: A unified digital destination bringing together live scores, draws, schedules, results, player profiles, match statistics, head-to-head comparisons, fan polls, and AI-powered commentary.
products_or_platforms.target_market_or_use_case: Tennis fan engagement across the LTA grass court season
products_or_platforms.section_heading: New AI-Powered Innovations Across the LTA Grass Court Season Include:

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting and technology services, today unveiled a new suite of AI-powered fan experiences in partnership with the Lawn Tennis Association (LTA)
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event and counterparty.

important_text_spans.text: Leveraging its innovative AI-first offering Infosys Topaz, powered by generative and agentic AI, Infosys will deliver real-time insights, intelligent storytelling, personalization, and responsible AI governance throughout the season.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the stated technology platform and use case.

processing_notes: Treated as non-material because the release describes sports fan-experience innovations and an ongoing collaboration without financial terms, contract value, revenue impact, or material operating metrics.
